fields.title: Replace mode-based execution profiles with concrete contracts
fields.description: Ralph and autoresearch currently capture/apply ExecutionProfile values that contain selector.mode and promptProfile.mode. After modes are removed, loop/session correctness should be based on concrete model, thinking, tool policy, sandbox, and agent capability data.
fields.design: Change execution schemas and Ralph/autoresearch contract code so an execution profile stores concrete model and thinking plus execution policy, without selector.mode or mode-named model assignment maps. Capture reads the current Pi model/thinking without mutating persisted tau state. Apply validates model availability/auth and thinking support, then sets Pi model/thinking and tool policy explicitly. Update Ralph configure labels and field classification from mode/model/thinking to model/thinking/policy. Invalid old mode-shaped persisted loop state should fail fast with a clear schema error rather than being silently migrated.
fields.acceptance_criteria: ExecutionProfile schema contains no mode selector or promptProfile.mode. Ralph loop state and autoresearch state persist concrete execution contracts. Capturing a contract does not write prompt-mode session state. Applying a contract does not resolve a mode preset. /ralph configure displays and recaptures concrete model/thinking/policy data. Tests cover stale mode-shaped persisted data failing clearly and current concrete contracts applying correctly.
